'''鈭歞-y-dh''' ('''dayadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbit|unbit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbit|unbit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-y-dh
|-
! Lemma
| dayadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dayadhithi|dayadhithi]] || [[word:dayadhiji|dayadhiji]] || [[word:dayadhishi|dayadhishi]] || [[word:dayadhi|dayadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayadhuthuth|dayadhuthuth]] || [[word:dayadhujuj|dayadhujuj]] || [[word:dayadhushush|dayadhushush]] || [[word:dayadh|dayadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayadhuthu|dayadhuthu]] || [[word:dayadhuju|dayadhuju]] || [[word:dayadhushu|dayadhushu]] || [[word:dayadhu|dayadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayadhufuth|dayadhufuth]] || [[word:dayadhufuj|dayadhufuj]] || [[word:dayadhufush|dayadhufush]] || [[word:dayadhuf|dayadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dayadhethe|dayadhethe]] || [[word:dayadheje|dayadheje]] || [[word:dayadheshe|dayadheshe]] || [[word:dayadhe|dayadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayadhothoth|dayadhothoth]] || [[word:dayadhojoj|dayadhojoj]] || [[word:dayadhoshosh|dayadhoshosh]] || [[word:dayadh|dayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayadhotho|dayadhotho]] || [[word:dayadhojo|dayadhojo]] || [[word:dayadhosho|dayadhosho]] || [[word:dayadho|dayadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayadhofoth|dayadhofoth]] || [[word:dayadhofoj|dayadhofoj]] || [[word:dayadhofosh|dayadhofosh]] || [[word:dayadhof|dayadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dayadh忙th忙|dayadh忙th忙]] || [[word:dayadh忙j忙|dayadh忙j忙]] || [[word:dayadh忙sh忙|dayadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:dayadh忙|dayadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayadhathath|dayadhathath]] || [[word:dayadhajaj|dayadhajaj]] || [[word:dayadhashash|dayadhashash]] || [[word:dayadh|dayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayadhatha|dayadhatha]] || [[word:dayadhaja|dayadhaja]] || [[word:dayadhasha|dayadhasha]] || [[word:dayadha|dayadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayadhafath|dayadhafath]] || [[word:dayadhafaj|dayadhafaj]] || [[word:dayadhafash|dayadhafash]] || [[word:dayadhaf|dayadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dayadhasha|dayadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godayadhasha|godayadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidayadhasha|gokidayadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dayadhn眉sha|dayadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godayadhnkn眉sha|godayadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidayadhn眉sha|gokidayadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dayadhsh毛sha|dayadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godayadhnksh毛sha|godayadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidayadhsh毛sha|gokidayadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dayadhrosha|dayadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godayadhnkrosha|godayadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidayadhrosha|gokidayadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dayadhmusha|dayadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godayadhnkmusha|godayadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidayadhmusha|gokidayadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dayadhsherasha|dayadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godayadhnksherasha|godayadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidayadhsherasha|gokidayadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dayadhngasha|dayadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godayadhnkngasha|godayadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidayadhngasha|gokidayadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dayadhyasha|dayadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godayadhnkyasha|godayadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidayadhyasha|gokidayadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dayadhyamasha|dayadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godayadhnkyamasha|godayadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidayadhyamasha|gokidayadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dayadhn眉sh毛sha|dayadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godayadhnkn眉sh毛sha|godayadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidayadhn眉sh毛sha|gokidayadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dayadhn眉rosha|dayadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godayadhnkn眉rosha|godayadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidayadhn眉rosha|gokidayadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayadhn眉musha|dayadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godayadhnkn眉musha|godayadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidayadhn眉musha|gokidayadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dayadhsh毛n眉sha|dayadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godayadhnksh毛n眉sha|godayadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidayadhsh毛n眉sha|gokidayadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dayadhsh毛rosha|dayadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godayadhnksh毛rosha|godayadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidayadhsh毛rosha|gokidayadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayadhsh毛musha|dayadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godayadhnksh毛musha|godayadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidayadhsh毛musha|gokidayadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dayadhron眉sha|dayadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godayadhnkron眉sha|godayadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidayadhron眉sha|gokidayadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dayadhrosh毛sha|dayadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godayadhnkrosh毛sha|godayadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidayadhrosh毛sha|gokidayadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dayadhromusha|dayadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godayadhnkromusha|godayadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidayadhromusha|gokidayadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dayadhmun眉sha|dayadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godayadhnkmun眉sha|godayadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidayadhmun眉sha|gokidayadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dayadhmush毛sha|dayadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godayadhnkmush毛sha|godayadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidayadhmush毛sha|gokidayadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dayadhmurosha|dayadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godayadhnkmurosha|godayadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidayadhmurosha|gokidayadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dayadh|dayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙y忙dh|d忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodayadh|hodayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙y忙dh|hod忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodayadh|hohodayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙y忙dh|hohod忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dayadh|n眉dayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙y忙dh|n眉d忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dayadh|n眉n眉dayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙y忙dh|n眉n眉d忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dayadh|n茂dayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙y忙dh|n茂d忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dayadh|n茂n茂dayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙y忙dh|n茂n茂d忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludayadh|ludayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙y忙dh|lud忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludayadh|luludayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙y忙dh|lulud忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidayadh|lidayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙y忙dh|lid忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidayadh|lilidayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙y忙dh|lilid忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodayadh|kodayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙y忙dh|kod忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodayadh|kokodayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙y忙dh|kokod忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedayadh|kedayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙y忙dh|ked忙y忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedayadh|kekedayadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙y忙dh|keked忙y忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
